stemHtml: The PIC of an aircraft under unlawful interference that must deviate from its assigned track or flight level without being able to contact ATS should, whenever possible…

options.a: try to broadcast warnings on the current frequency or on the emergency frequency.
options.b: change the transponder code to the current code plus 5.
options.c: fly at the corresponding IFR flight level offset by plus or minus 200 ft.
options.d: once on the new track, alter heading by 5 degrees every 5 minutes.
